intro_2.speaker: Strange Rock
intro_2.text: I may look like a rock, but I promise I'm not.

choices.text: I must be dreaming right now...

intro_3.speaker: Crab
intro_3.text: I'm a crab. What you humans would call a horseshoe crab.

intro_3_2_1.speaker: Crab
intro_3_2_1.text: I'm not quite sure what that means... I meant “what time is it?”

intro_3_2_2.speaker: Crab
intro_3_2_2.text: Well, that's okay, because it doesn't really matter does it?

intro_4.speaker: Crab
intro_4.text: I don't really understand time the way you do. It's all the same to me.

intro_5.speaker: Crab
intro_5.text: I really only remember the things that've happened, but even then, I'm not quite sure that matters.

intro_6.speaker: Crab
intro_6.text: You seem like a knowledgable fellow. Can you help me with something?

intro_7_1.speaker: Crab
intro_7_1.text: Tell me about the past and tell me what it means.

intro_7_2.speaker: Crab
intro_7_2.text: No, don't listen. I want you to tell me something! Tell me about the past and tell me what it means.

intro_8.speaker: Crab
intro_8.text: I've lived for so long and yet there are things even I don't understand.

intro_9.speaker: Crab
intro_9.text: Makes me feel like I don't even know who I am.

intro_10.speaker: Crab
intro_10.text: Let me think for a moment...

intro_11.speaker: Crab
intro_11.text: Hmmm... there was this one time where...
